description: A light blue field charged with the coat of arms of Sofia at the centre.
history: Adopted with the modern coat of arms by Sofia City Council; the arms combine the goddess Sredets, Saint Sofia, the Vitosha mountain and the figure of a lion to symbolise the history of the Bulgarian capital.

features.symbolism: combining the goddess of wisdom, Saint Sofia, the Vitosha mountain and a lion, representing the city's classical, religious and natural heritage
